case_title: FEDERATED INDIANS OF GRATON RANCHERIA VS. KENWOOD INVESTMENTS NO. 2, LLC
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-01-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: FINAL ARBITRATION AWARD CONFIRMED IN FAVOR OF FEDERATED INDIANS OF GRATON RANCHERIA AND AGAINST KENWOOD INVESTMENTS NO. 2, LLC. KENWOOD NO. 2 SHALL TAKE NOTHING FROM THE TRIBE, AND ITS CLAIMS AGAINST THE TRIBE WILL BE AND ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE TRIBE SHALL RECOVER FEES AND COSTS AGAINST KENWOOD NO. 2 IN THE AMOUNT OF $725,657.48. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FULL DETAILS.)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62095545) FILED BY PETITIONER FEDERATED INDIANS OF GRATON RANCHERIA
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER FEDERATED INDIANS OF GRATON RANCHERIA
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 62264697) FILED BY PETITIONER FEDERATED INDIANS OF GRATON RANCHERIA AS TO RESPONDENT KENWOOD INVESTMENTS NO. 2, LLC
NOTICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER FEDERATED INDIANS OF GRATON RANCHERIA HEARING SET FOR JUN-01-2018 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER FEDERATED INDIANS OF GRATON RANCHERIA

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER FEDERATED INDIANS OF GRATON RANCHERIA'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600 (302/RBU)

Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Request For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Joel Zeldin of Shartsis Friese LLP, Tel. No. 1-415-421-6500 appearing
for the Petitioner;
Atty. Robert A. Julian of Winston & Strawn LLP, Tel. No. 1-415-591-1404 appearing for

RULING - The matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner Federated Indians of Graton Rancheria's petition to confirm arbitration is GRANTED pursuant to stipulation. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 302/ru
